text:
Leech (, Hiru) was a member of the Shadow Beasts, the elite guard of the Ten Dons. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 75 

Appearance

Leech was a large, portly man with black hair and a distinctive nose. He was seen wearing casual clothing: a T-shirt, casual trousers, and a pair of sports shoes. When using his ability, he would extend the opening of the sac inside his body from his mouth, giving it the appearance of either a large tongue or an insect proboscis. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 76 

Personality

Leech was a sadist, which he revealed when he relished in describing the horrible death that awaited Uvogin at the hands of his leeches. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

As Uvogin continues to massacre dozens of Mafia members in the Gordeau Desert, four Shadow Beasts (including Leech) sent by the Ten Dons arrive to confront the Underground Auction thieves. They first appear in front of the Nostrade Family bodyguards, with Leech confidently saying that they should leave the matter to them. 

After Worm's punch is ineffective, and the Shadow Beast is forced to drag Uvogin underground, he warns the Spider that he can either die underground or be killed by his comrades. As the other three ready their auras and leap toward him, Uvogin unleashes his Big Bang Impact and leaves no trace of Worm except his arm, creating an enormous crater in the earth and forcing the other Shadow Beasts to leap back. They soon recognize his Spider tattoo and that he's a member of the Phantom Troupe. 

Uvogin asks which of them wants to die next, but the three waste no time in confronting him. After Porcupine distracts him with his hair and Rabid Dog paralyzes him with his neurotoxin, Leech appears behind Uvogin and begins inserting thousands of leeches into the wound on his shoulder. He tells the Spider that he keeps a variety of leeches inside his body, and while the creatures can be used for treatment, they can also cause diseases. He then explains that the leeches entering Uvogin's body will lay eggs in his bladder and cause millions of babies to burst through him as he urinates, adding that most people die from the pain alone. Before Leech can finish his explanation, Uvogin suddenly bites off a large portion of his head, leaving his brain exposed. As he chews the flesh and bone, Uvogin doesn't enjoy the taste and says that brains are supposed to be delicacies, spitting it out afterward. 

Abilities & Powers

As a Shadow Beast, Leech was very influential within the Mafia Community. He was also a capable fighter, one of the best serving under the Ten Dons, since he was chosen as one of their personal bodyguards. However, he was no match for Uvogin.

Nen

. As a Shadow Beast, he was one of the ten best Nen users within the Mafia Community, making him a fearsome opponent. His abilities also worked well in conjunction with those of other Shadow Beasts. He was fairly proficient at Zetsu since he managed to get near the Nostrade bodyguards with only Melody and possibly Kurapika noticing.
